message:
feat(conformance): add 6 tensor operation conformance suites (scan, join, sort, indexing, inplace, advanced)

Expand the ft-conformance harness with six new tensor operation
categories, each with fixture JSON files, report types, case runner
functions, and dual-mode (strict/hardened) smoke tests.

New conformance suites:
- tensor_scan: cumsum, cumprod, cummax, cummin with gradient
  verification (8+ cases)
- tensor_join: cat and stack operations with multi-input gradient
  propagation (9+ cases)
- tensor_sort: sort, argsort, topk with index correctness checks
  (9+ cases)
- tensor_indexing: index_select, gather, scatter, masked_select,
  nonzero with shape validation (10+ cases)
- tensor_inplace: add_, mul_, sub_, fill_, zero_ mutation operations
  with output verification (9+ cases)
- tensor_advanced: flip, roll, repeat, pad operations with shape
  validation (10+ cases)

Report types added to lib.rs:
- TensorScanCaseReport (output_ok, shape_ok, grad_ok)
- TensorJoinCaseReport (output_ok, shape_ok, grad_ok)
- TensorSortCaseReport (output_ok, shape_ok, indices_ok)
- TensorIndexingCaseReport (output_ok, shape_ok)
- TensorInplaceCaseReport (output_ok)
- TensorAdvancedCaseReport (output_ok, shape_ok)

Each suite includes fixture deserialization structs, case runner
functions with forensic logging and runtime evidence capture, and
public run_tensor_*_conformance entry points. All smoke tests verify
both execution modes pass with full case coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,125 @@
+{
+  "cases": [
+    {
+      "name": "sort_1d_ascending",
+      "op": "sort",
+      "input": [3.0, 1.0, 4.0, 1.0, 5.0],
+      "shape": [5],
+      "dim": 0,
+      "descending": false,
+      "expected_output": [1.0, 1.0, 3.0, 4.0, 5.0],
+      "expected_shape": [5],
+      "expected_indices": [1, 3, 0, 2, 4],
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-SORT-001"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:sort"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_1d_descending",
+      "op": "sort",
+      "input": [3.0, 1.0, 4.0, 1.0, 5.0],
+      "shape": [5],
+      "dim": 0,
+      "descending": true,
+      "expected_output": [5.0, 4.0, 3.0, 1.0, 1.0],
+      "expected_shape": [5],
+      "expected_indices": [4, 2, 0, 1, 3],
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-SORT-002"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:sort"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_2d_dim1",
+      "op": "sort",
+      "input": [3.0, 1.0, 4.0, 2.0],
+      "shape": [2, 2],
+      "dim": 1,
+      "descending": false,
+      "expected_output": [1.0, 3.0, 2.0, 4.0],
+      "expected_shape": [2, 2],
+      "expected_indices": [1, 0, 1, 0],
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-SORT-003"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:sort"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "topk_1d_largest",
+      "op": "topk",
+      "input": [3.0, 1.0, 4.0, 1.0, 5.0, 9.0, 2.0],
+      "shape": [7],
+      "dim": 0,
+      "k": 3,
+      "largest": true,
+      "sorted": true,
+      "expected_output": [9.0, 5.0, 4.0],
+      "expected_shape": [3],
+      "expected_indices": [5, 4, 2],
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-SORT-004"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:sort"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "topk_1d_smallest",
+      "op": "topk",
+      "input": [3.0, 1.0, 4.0, 1.0, 5.0, 9.0, 2.0],
+      "shape": [7],
+      "dim": 0,
+      "k": 3,
+      "largest": false,
+      "sorted": true,
+      "expected_output": [1.0, 1.0, 2.0],
+      "expected_shape": [3],
+      "expected_indices": [1, 3, 6],
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-SORT-005"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:sort"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "argsort_1d_ascending",
+      "op": "argsort",
+      "input": [3.0, 1.0, 4.0, 1.0, 5.0],
+      "shape": [5],
+      "dim": 0,
+      "descending": false,
+      "expected_output": [1.0, 3.0, 0.0, 2.0, 4.0],
+      "expected_shape": [5],
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-SORT-006"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:sort"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "argsort_1d_descending",
+      "op": "argsort",
+      "input": [3.0, 1.0, 4.0, 1.0, 5.0],
+      "shape": [5],
+      "dim": 0,
+      "descending": true,
+      "expected_output": [4.0, 2.0, 0.0, 1.0, 3.0],
+      "expected_shape": [5],
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-SORT-007"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:sort"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "sort_already_sorted",
+      "op": "sort",
+      "input": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0],
+      "shape": [4],
+      "dim": 0,
+      "descending": false,
+      "expected_output": [1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0],
+      "expected_shape": [4],
+      "expected_indices": [0, 1, 2, 3],
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-SORT-008"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:sort"]
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "topk_k1",
+      "op": "topk",
+      "input": [3.0, 7.0, 1.0, 5.0],
+      "shape": [4],
+      "dim": 0,
+      "k": 1,
+      "largest": true,
+      "sorted": true,
+      "expected_output": [7.0],
+      "expected_shape": [1],
+      "expected_indices": [1],
+      "contract_ids": ["CPU-KERNEL-SORT-009"],
+      "e2e_scenarios": ["cpu_kernel:sort"]
+    }
+  ]
+}
